name: image_load_side_load_office_dlls
raw_query: any where file.path:"*\\outllib.dll" and (not (file.path like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Office\\OFFICE*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft Office\\OFFICE*", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Office\\Root\\OFFICE*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft Office\\Root\\OFFICE*")))
